title: Introduction to the Audio Shear Zone

steps.text: Welcome to the Audio Shear Zone. Find a comfortable position, and if you have headphones, put them on now. Take a slow breath in... and out. Let the sound of the ocean settle around you.

Beneath the ocean, you may begin to notice a soft presence of sound. This is pink noise — a balanced spectral texture that gently masks distraction and prepares the auditory system for what comes next.

A low tone is now entering the space. This is the OM fundamental — one hundred and thirty six point one hertz. A frequency associated with breath, with the pulse of the natural world. You do not need to do anything with it. Simply allow it.

steps.label: Binaural tone engaging — Alpha I at 10 Hz...

steps.text: If you are wearing headphones, you may now notice a subtle pulsing quality in the sound — a gentle rhythm that seems to arise from nowhere. This is a binaural beat. Your left ear is receiving a tone of three hundred and ninety six hertz. Your right ear, four hundred and six hertz. The difference — ten hertz — exists only in your mind. Your brain is generating it. This is the frequency of relaxed, open awareness.
Simply rest here. There is nothing to achieve. The sounds are doing their work. Your only task is to breathe slowly, and allow.

The binaural tone is now gently fading. The tools of this space are available to you whenever you choose to return. You may explore freely — the session presets, the noise layers, the environmental sounds, the harmonic tones. Each combination opens a different door.
Welcome to the Audio Shear Zone.
